# Middle East Region

**Summary**: The geographic region of the Middle East.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-alabbad|Alabbad, 2024]] applied the methodology to a Middle East organic-rich mudrock field.

- [[2024-yusmananto|Yusmananto, 2024]] studied the Upper Kharaib Member as a reservoir in the Middle East.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[2024-alabbad|Alabbad, 2024]] Organic-rich mudrock

- [[2024-yusmananto|Yusmananto, 2024]] studied the Upper Kharaib Member as a reservoir in the Middle East.

## Formations Present



## Key Findings From This Location

- The model successfully matched wireline data for a Middle East shale well, confirming its applicability in this region. ([[2024-alabbad|Alabbad, 2024, p. 102]])

- The Upper Kharaib Member is widely distributed across the Middle East (Qatar, Oman, Saudi Arabia, Kuwait). ([[2024-yusmananto|Yusmananto, 2024, p. 123]])
